title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 50 Chukar Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: After school: Monday-Friday 3pm-5:30pm Non-school days: 10am-5:30pm Summer: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 553-2323 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 553-2323 Main phone Main phone (541) 553-2323 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: City of Warm Springs Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
